summary: Created 3 conversion-optimized email templates for Sovereign-Node-Watch targeting digital agencies, SaaS startups, and dev teams. Each template includes A/B test subject lines, personalization tokens, social proof, and clear CTAs for 14-day free trial.
deliverables: Digital Agencies Email Template (white-label monitoring focus)
SaaS Startups Email Template (cost optimization focus)
Dev Teams Email Template (sleep/downtime prevention focus)
A/B test subject line variations for each segment
Complete markdown formatting with unsubscribe footers
